mapper.select: SELECT f.function_id AS functionId, f.function_pid AS functionPid, f.name, f.sort FROM sys_role_function rf LEFT JOIN sys_function f ON rf.function_id = f.function_id WHERE rf.role_id = #{roleId} order by f.sort ASC

SELECT f.menu_id AS menuId, f.name, f.own_func As fuctionId FROM sys_role_menu rf LEFT JOIN sys_menu f ON rf.menu_id = f.menu_id LEFT JOIN sys_function sf ON f.own_func = sf.function_id WHERE rf.role_id = #{roleId}
